0.90  Implements the approved plan — Core requirements all met: Tier enum, registry, TierForLanguage, and all 3 required tests (dynamic KnownLanguages loop, unknown→Generic, Swift→Generic). Discovery changes (KnownLanguages()) were not listed as target files but directly enable the plan's mandate to 'iterate all known language IDs from discovery' — reasonable supporting work.
0.90  Minimal and scoped — Plan listed 2 target files; build touched 4. Extra discovery changes are small (48 lines, one utility + one test), directly serve the plan's objective, and contain zero unrelated churn.
1.00  No test-gaming / faking — Test iterates discovery.KnownLanguages() dynamically — any new language without a tier entry will fail CI. No hardcoded expected values to force green. Swift explicitly checked as TierGeneric. Unknown-language fail-safe verified. No test weakening or deletion.
1.00  Safe to advance — All changes additive only. KnownLanguages() is read-only. Tier registry has no side effects. Tests are guardrails, not risks. No correctness, security, or regression concerns.
0.90  Judge confidence — at or above the confidence bar
